title: Silverwood Trees
description: Silverwood Trees adds four unique, real-world inspired trees to Minecraft: Silverberry, Staghorn Sumac, Walnut, and Silver Maple. These trees bring new wood types, planks, and saplings, enhancing the game's world with realistic and immersive details.
body:
**Silverwood Trees** is a mod that adds four new, realistic, and beautifully crafted trees to Minecraft, each inspired by real-world species. The mod focuses on trees that are both aesthetically pleasing and immersive, providing new wood types, leaves, and saplings to enhance the vanilla experience.

![Mod Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cfc5e3f03607a355fff156d8997818aa6fe3f50.png)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris) [![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)

## Trees Added:
### Silverberry
A unique tree known for its silvery wood with pale golden and grayish hues. It grows rarely in Taiga biomes. This tree adds a light, almost ethereal feel to your forests.

![Silverberry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/572f2870629b2ea4b865f18f3dfc56f90fd35c54_0.webp)

### Staghorn Sumac
With striking red-tinged wood and bold leaves, this tree thrives in warm, dry climates, making it perfect for the Savanna Plateau biome. The Staghorn Sumac brings vibrant color and a new texture to your world.

![Staghorn Sumac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8d9edaf2cc5c8307caa50cf9a0655ba98452742_0.webp)

### Walnut
A large and stately tree, the Walnut adds a darker, rich brown to your world, with its wood resembling real-world walnut trees. Found in Forests, its wood offers a natural and grounded look.

![Walnut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fefba745d4b12a7149bc4840e7115d2b42193a5_0.webp)

### Silver Maple
Known for its silvery leaves and soft, light wood, the Silver Maple thrives near Flower Forests. The tree offers a beautiful contrast with its smooth bark and subtle, gentle aesthetic.

![Silver Maple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a218988b382005ac377bf016c66b3cb063428709_0.webp)

## Features:
- New Wood Types: Each tree introduces new wood blocks and planks, offering a variety of colors ranging from light silver to deep reddish hues.
- Unique Leaves and Saplings: Silverwood Trees features distinctive leaf textures and saplings that can be planted and cultivated in Minecraft.
- Realistic and Immersive: All four trees are inspired by real-world species, making them a perfect addition for players who want a more natural feel in their Minecraft world.

## Why You’ll Love It:
- Immersion: The trees are designed to blend seamlessly with the vanilla Minecraft world, making the experience feel more diverse and rich without changing the core mechanics.

## Aesthetic Variety: 
- Whether you’re looking for a vibrant pop of red from the Staghorn Sumac or the subtle elegance of the Silver Maple, these trees will bring variety to your builds.

## Customization: 
- With new planks, wood types, and unique textures, these trees provide plenty of options for builders and crafters looking to add a new dimension to their creations.
